name: Real-World - Distracted Caller Needs Repeats
description: Multitasking caller mishears and needs instructions repeated.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: Sorry - yeah, warranty claim. Hang on... okay what did you say?
expectedOutcome: Agent patiently repeats key instructions (website steps, expectations) without losing state, and confirms understanding before sending the link.
